channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Iran: Relearning the Importance of Waging a War, Not Just Fighting One
item.description: Lieutenant General James Michael Dubik (U.S. Army, ret) examines the divergence between the United States' warfighting capabilities and war-waging requirements, highlighting three skills critical to waging war.
